description: Макет веб-сайта RubyHome - сайт недвижимости с секциями: Header, Hero, Popular Properties, Our Partners, Property Featured, Reviews, CTA, Footer, Leave Request Modal

sections.name: Header
components: Navigation: Home, Properties, About us, Reviews

sections.name: Hero
components: Heading: Find the perfect place to stay with your family

sections.name: Popular Properties
components: Property cards with images, titles, locations, specs (bedrooms, bathrooms, parking), prices

sections.name: Property Featured
components: Feature cards: 100% Security, Free air conditioner, Flower garden, Swimming pool, Rental furniture, Parkers & movers

sections.name: Reviews
components: Section title: Our valuable customer says
Review cards with quotes, author names, positions, avatars

sections.name: CTA
components: Heading: Get listed your home as a owner
Email subscription form with Subscribe button

sections.name: Footer
components: Copyright text: © 2025 RubyHome. All rights reserved

sections.name: Leave Request Modal
components: Form with fields: Name, Phone, Email
I want to: Buy/Rent/Sell toggle buttons

note: Полные данные макета с детальной структурой сохранены в файле. Используйте их для верстки.
